Declares a function to get the CPU awake time in milliseconds for analytics applications.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`analytics_app_cpu_awake_ms`](<#analytics_app_cpu_awake_ms>) that returns a `uint32_t` value. The function is likely intended to provide the number of milliseconds the CPU has been awake in an analytics application. The inclusion of `<inttypes.h>` suggests that the code uses fixed-width integer types for portability across different platforms. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
